description.from: Unleashes an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing 684*(1+0.3Skill Level)+300% of Attack Power Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG by shooting a bouncing projectile which bounces 3 times starting from the nearest enemy. The further the enemy, the more DMG inflicted.

description.from: Deals 792*(1+0.3Skill Level)+347.5% of Attack Power Magic Damage 2 time(s) to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for 1sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies furthest away in a small range, and stuns them for 3 sec. The further the enemy, the more DMG they will take.

description.from: Deals 342*(1+0.3Skill Level)+150% of Attack Power Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for 1sec, and reduces their Critical Chance by 25% for 7sec. Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to target enemies in range, and reduces target's Crit Chance by 100% for 7 sec.

description.from: Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing 799*(1+0.3Skill Level)+350% of Attack Power Magic Damage, knocking them back for 0.5sec, and increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: When inflicted by CC, dispels negative effects from self and attacks the farthest enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and knocking it away for 2 sec.

light.to: Gains immunity to CC for the duration of Skill.

dark.to: Enemies hit are stunned for 2 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 2000, but the number of hits is increased by 2.
light.to: In exchange for 2 additional Mana Cost, attacks random enemies 3 times.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but targets the farthest enemy.

light.to: Reduces ACC of hit enemies by 150 for 7 sec.

dark.from: For 7 sec, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 150.
dark.to: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, knock back the enemy over a long distance.

description.from: [Pew!] Increases DMG by {0}%, and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by 200.
description.to: [Pew!] Increases DMG by 20%, and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by {0}.

description.from: [Twinkle Twinkle] The Crit Chance Reduction effect becomes irremovable, and increases the duration by {0} sec.
description.to: [Twinkle Twinkle] Crit Chance Reduction will not be dispelled, and the effect duration will increase by {0} sec.

description.from: [Gotcha!] reduces Cooldown by {0} sec and cleanses self when affected by a CC once every 20 sec.
description.to: [Gotcha!] Greatly increases the knockback range, and Cooldown is reduced by {0} sec.

dark.from: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 10%, and damage taken is reduced by 10%.
dark.to: Grants Blessing of the Carrot. Blessing of the Carrot increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 30%, and reduces DMG received by 30%.

description.from: Critical Damage is increased by {0}%, Normal Attack damage by {1}%, and Attack Range by {2}%.
description.to: Increases Crit DMG by {0}%, DMG of normal attacks by {1}% and the Range by {2}%.
